chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc: Application No.S-35 of 2026 “Anam Mariyam versus Ghazeen Khan & others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026 Mr. Farhan Ahmed Bozdar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G a/w SIP Azizullah PS Tando Adam. Mr. Zuhaib Hassan Mari advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.1. = In compliance with the last order, the police have produced the detenue, namely Baby Ishaal, daughter of Ghazeen Khan, and respondent No.1, who is stated to be her father, before this Court. However, the applicant, being the mother of the minor, has submitted in the case that she has the right of custody of the minor as she is minor and of female gender. Since the proper forum for guardianship matters is already in field, which should decide the custody of the minor in the family proceedings, both parties are directed to approach the appropriate forum for the custody of the minor. In the meanwhile, for interim arrangement, the visiting hours of the minor with her mother are fixed to be after school until 07:00 PM. Respondent No.1 is directed to hand over the child/minor to her mother during these hours and ensure that the visits of the child/minor with her mother are duly facilitated. The visiting hours of the applicant shall be applicable on all dates, including holidays, until the decision of the Guardian Court. In view of above terms, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is hereby disposed of. JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
